free_text: Photoneutron cross sections for V51 and Co59.
The photoneutron sample consisted of 6 or 7 disks of
metal, each 2 in. in diameter and 0.25 in. thick.
Dates corrected  from  two  to four digits including
reaction in L0001002 changed from (g,sn) to (g,xn),
Data converted from file of B.Berman.
The threshold of (gamma,n+p) reaction is 19.0 mev.

The threshold of (gamma,n+p) reaction is 17.4 MeV.

The threshold of (gamma,2n+p) reaction is 25.1 MeV.
